name: Morphous Kingfisher
description: A shadcn/tweakcn-compatible system to be coded from the Kingfisher light and dark design-system boards: electric-blue plumage, rust-orange chest, water-teal support, crisp riverbank contrast, and sharp media controls. The light and dark boards are the reference for coding any future theme.
typography: Geist for sharp media UI with Noto Sans guidance for multilingual labels, asset metadata, and fast review screens.
layout: Precise 8px media grids, beak-sharp dividers, waterline panels, bright focus states, and compact review dashboards.
